candidates.why: Component of revenue but not total; use as fallback after primary total revenue line.
Interest component of revenue; secondary priority after main total revenues line.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating all revenue sources; best primary candidate for top-line revenue.
Financial income but not overall operating revenue; lower-priority fallback.
General interest revenue line; potential revenue component but not main total revenues line.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue; not appropriate for REVT.
Balance sheet accrual, not a revenue line item.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total revenues' as the primary top-line revenue measure, with main component revenue lines as fallbacks per priority rule.

candidates.why: Most direct representation of cost of services that generate revenue, fitting COGS/cost of sales concept.
External expenses but likely broader overhead rather than direct COGS; secondary fit.
Generally SG&A-type overhead rather than direct COGS for this type of business.
Broader operating overhead bucket; more SG&A than COGS.
Residual operating expenses; more SG&A-like overhead than direct production costs.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financial, not operating COGS.
Small lease-related cost; not primary COGS measure.
Non-recurring adjustment to personnel costs; not core recurring COGS.
Non-recurring operating items; not core recurring COGS.

candidates.row_label: Accrued costs of external collection services and other expenses
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrual related to external service costs; informative but not an income statement COGS line.

variables.notes: Used 'External expenses of services provided' as the primary direct cost of services, which best matches COGS for a collection/loan servicing business.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A component representing staff/overhead personnel costs.
Broad operating overhead bucket excluding COGS; strong SG&A component.
Adjustments to personnel costs; still part of SG&A structure though non-recurring.
Non-recurring operating overhead; belongs with SG&A components per guidance.

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead components (personnel and other operating expenses, including non-recurring variants) in line with SG&A component guidance; excluded totals and COGS-like lines.
No research & development-related line items (e.g., containing 'research' or 'development') appear in the provided statements; treat R&D expense as zero.

candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; not used for XINT but considered as context.
Interest income; not an expense line.
Primary interest expense line; best candidate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of interest rate derivatives
candidates.why: Derivative fair value changes; financing-related but not pure interest expense.
Interest component of lease liabilities; secondary interest expense component.
Additional interest expense line for some years; good fallback candidate.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
OCI/hedging item; not the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; possible fallback for XINT.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Non-current interest bearing loans and borrowings
candidates.why: Debt balance, not P&L interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Current interest bearing loans and borrowings
candidates.why: Debt balance, not P&L interest expense.
Accrued interest liability; not the expense line itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense lines, starting with the main 'Interest expenses' line, then additional specific interest expense components as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Component of equity but not the full shareholders’ equity; less preferred than explicit total attributable to parent shareholders.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Explicit equity attributable to parent shareholders, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Represents minority interests; should be mapped to MIB, not BE.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; use only if parent-only equity were unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys shareholders - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/technical row, not the main reported equity value.
Balancing item, not the substantive equity line.
Balancing item, not the substantive equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item for the whole statement; not appropriate for BE.
Total of liabilities plus equity; not an equity-only measure.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Used the explicit 'Equity attributable to parent companys shareholders' line to represent book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per guidance.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to NCI; conceptually minority interest but P&L based. Balance sheet equivalents are preferred for MIB stock.
Explicit equity attributable to non-controlling interests; best candidate for minority interest in equity (MIB).
Alternate label for non-controlling interests in equity; good secondary candidate.
Income statement total for minority interest; equity-based balance sheet lines are preferred for MIB.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet equity lines for non-controlling interests, using 'Equity attributable to non-controlling interests' as primary and 'Minority Interest' as a fallback.
